Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class AccountTransfer

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.AccountTransfer
public class AccountTransfer extends Object
AccountTransfer - Used to record the movement of funds or shares during the bookkeeping phase of an account transfer and details related to the account transfer
